entities.description: broker hivemq com is the mqtt server address used to connect to the mqtt service
index html is a file located in the  tools web mqtt sub  directory that is opened in a web browser to access the mqtt interface
web    refers to the web page that appears after opening the index html file and allows interaction with the mqtt server
mqtt is a communication protocol used for transmitting data between the arm end and the web end
tcp is a communication protocol used by the arm end for mqtt communication
websocket is a communication protocol used by the web end for mqtt communication

relations.description: index html is the file that generates the web    when opened in a browser
the web    allows interaction with the mqtt server to retrieve and display data
mqtt on the arm end uses tcp as its communication protocol
mqtt on the web end uses websocket as its communication protocol
the web    retrieves and displays the sine wave data from the mqtt server
the sine wave data is plotted as a waveform on the web page
